# SEOHub

> Free full-site SEO audit you run every week. Crawl public HTML, run 50+ checks, and use free keyword and technical tools — no account required.

## Docs

- [Homepage](/): Run a website audit
- [Tools](/tools): Free SEO toolkit index
- [Competitor audit](/competitors): Compare up to 10 websites side by side
- [Guides](/guides): Fix titles, canonicals, headers, and more
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free preview and one-time full-site unlock
- [Sample report](/r/sample): Public example of a full audit
- [About](/about): Why SEOHub exists
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle data
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms of use

## Optional

- [Keyword tracker](/tracker): On-device keyword tracking
- [Scan history](/history): Local history and watchlist
